project.name: bitwarden-server
project.description: Bitwarden Server is primarily a .NET project but includes npm sub-projects for email templating (mjml), admin portal, and SSO portal. The vulnerable dependency html-minifier exists only in the Mjml sub-project at src/Core/MailTemplates/Mjml/.

vulnerability.description: A Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) flaw was found in html-minifier up to 4.0.0 via the candidate variable in htmlminifier.js.
vulnerability.fixed_in_version: No fix available; html-minifier is unmaintained. html-minifier-terser is the maintained fork.

dependency_chain.description: html-minifier:4.0.0 is a transitive dependency in the @bitwarden/mjml-emails sub-project (src/Core/MailTemplates/Mjml/). It is never declared directly in package.json. It is pulled in through mjml -> mjml-cli -> html-minifier AND through mjml-core -> html-minifier. mjml-core is both a direct dependency of the project AND a transitive dependency through mjml. The most complex chain is the 4-hop path through mjml -> mjml-cli -> html-minifier.
path: mjml-cli:4.15.3 (transitive, pulled by mjml as one of 5 sub-packages)
html-minifier:4.0.0 (VULNERABLE - transitive, pulled by mjml-cli as one of 10 dependencies)
all_paths: mjml-core:4.15.3 (also a direct dependency in package.json)

dfs_tree_context.description: Full DFS traversal of the dependency tree from project root to html-minifier:4.0.0, showing siblings at each level for context. The most complex path (through mjml -> mjml-cli) is traced.

levels.notes: Both mjml and mjml-core are direct dependencies. mjml-core is also pulled transitively through mjml. Both lead to html-minifier.

mjml-core.note: ALSO depends on html-minifier:^4.0.0 (alternative path to the vulnerable dep)

mjml-preset-core.note: Aggregates 20+ mjml-* component packages (accordion, body, button, carousel, column, divider, group, head, hero, image, navbar, raw, section, social, spacer, table, text, wrapper, etc.)

mjml-migrate.note: Schema migration tool, depends on mjml-core (which in turn pulls html-minifier)

html-minifier.note: VULNERABLE - CVE-2022-37620 (ReDoS). This is the target.

chokidar.note: File watcher for --watch mode in mjml-cli

glob.note: File globbing, depends on minimatch:^9.0.4, foreground-child, jackspeak, minipass, package-json-from-dist, path-scurry

minimatch.note: Glob pattern matching, depends on brace-expansion:^2.0.1

js-beautify.note: Code formatter for output, depends on config-chain, editorconfig, glob, js-cookie, nopt

mjml-core.note: Core rendering engine (also depends on html-minifier independently)

yargs.note: CLI argument parser, depends on cliui, escalade, get-caller-file, require-directory, string-width, y18n, yargs-parser

levels.notes: mjml-cli is the CLI runner for mjml. It has 12 dependencies, including html-minifier for output minification, glob/minimatch for file matching, chokidar for watch mode, and yargs for argument parsing.

camel-case.note: String utility, converts to camelCase. no-case:2.3.2 depends on lower-case:1.1.4.

clean-css.note: CSS optimizer/minifier. source-map:0.6.1 is a leaf.

param-case.note: String utility for param-case conversion. Shares no-case:2.3.2 with camel-case.

levels.notes: html-minifier:4.0.0 is the last published version (2019). The project is unmaintained. The maintained fork is html-minifier-terser. The ReDoS vulnerability is in the candidate variable regex in htmlminifier.js. html-minifier has 7 direct dependencies forming a subtree of ~11 packages total.
